heading: Disclosures on exercise of loan authority
label: 5235 Disclosures on exercise of loan authority
notes: References in TextSection 13 of the Federal Reserve Act, referred to in subsecs. (a) and (d), is classified to sections 92, 342 to 347, 347c, 347d, 361, 372, and 373 of this title. The third paragraph (now designated par. (3)) of section 13 of the Act is classified to . For further details, see Codification notes under sections 342 and 343 of this title.section 343(3) of this title

children.text: the justification for exercising the authority; and

the specific terms of the actions of the Board, including the size and duration of the lending, available information concerning the value of any collateral held with respect to such a loan, the recipient of warrants or any other potential equity in exchange for the loan, and any expected cost to the taxpayers for such exercise.
the value of the collateral held by the Federal reserve bank which initiated the loan; and
the projected cost to the taxpayers of the loan.

children.heading: Confidentiality
children.label: c Confidentiality
children.text: The information submitted to the Congress under this section shall be kept confidential, upon the written request of the Chairman of the Board, in which case it shall be made available only to the Chairpersons and Ranking Members of the Committees described in subsection (a).

children.heading: Applicability
children.label: d Applicability
children.text: The provisions of this section shall be in force for all uses of the authority provided under section 13 of the Federal Reserve Act occurring during the period beginning on and ending on the after , and reports described in subsection (a) shall be required beginning not later than 30 days after , with respect to any such exercise of authority.March 1, 2008October 3, 2008October 3, 20081So in original.1

children.heading: Sharing of information
children.label: e Sharing of information
children.text: Any reports required under this section shall also be submitted to the Congressional Oversight Panel established under .section 5233 of this title
